auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Semantic Scholar API key sent in the x-api-key header. Request a key from the official API page: https://www.semanticscholar.org/product/api#api-key-form.

actions.name: autocomplete_papers
actions.description: Suggest Semantic Scholar paper query completions.

query.description: The plain-text search query. Semantic Scholar does not support special query syntax.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for Semantic Scholar paper autocomplete.

items.description: One autocomplete suggestion returned by Semantic Scholar.

completions.description: The autocomplete suggestions returned by Semantic Scholar.

raw.description: The raw Semantic Scholar response payload.

outputSchema.description: The response returned by Semantic Scholar paper autocomplete.

actions.name: bulk_search_papers
actions.description: Bulk-search Semantic Scholar papers and page through large result sets with tokens.

query.description: The plain-text search query. Semantic Scholar does not support special query syntax.

fields.description: A comma-separated list of Semantic Scholar fields to return, using dot notation for nested fields when needed.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return.

token.description: The continuation token returned by Semantic Scholar.

year.description: The publication year or inclusive year range, such as 2019, 2016-2020, 2010-, or -2015.

venue.description: A comma-separated list of publication venues to filter by, using full names or abbreviations.

fieldsOfStudy.description: A comma-separated list of fields of study to filter by.

publicationTypes.description: A comma-separated list of publication types to filter by, such as Review, JournalArticle, or Conference.

publicationDateOrYear.description: The publication date or year filter, such as 2019, 2020-06, 2016-03-05:2020-06-06, 1981-08-25:, or :2015-01.

minCitationCount.description: The minimum number of citations a paper must have.

openAccessPdf.description: Whether to restrict results to papers with a public PDF available.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for bulk-searching Semantic Scholar papers.

anyOf.description: The total result count when Semantic Scholar returns it.
The returned result offset when Semantic Scholar returns it.
The next offset when Semantic Scholar returns it.
The continuation token when Semantic Scholar returns it.

items.description: The paper object returned by Semantic Scholar.

papers.description: The papers returned by Semantic Scholar.

raw.description: The raw Semantic Scholar response payload.

outputSchema.description: A Semantic Scholar paper list response.

actions.name: get_author
actions.description: Get details for a Semantic Scholar author.

fields.description: A comma-separated list of Semantic Scholar fields to return, using dot notation for nested fields when needed.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving a Semantic Scholar author.

author.description: The author object returned by Semantic Scholar.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving a Semantic Scholar author.

actions.name: get_author_papers
actions.description: List papers written by a Semantic Scholar author.

fields.description: A comma-separated list of Semantic Scholar fields to return, using dot notation for nested fields when needed.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Semantic Scholar author papers.

anyOf.description: The total result count when Semantic Scholar returns it.
The returned result offset when Semantic Scholar returns it.
The next offset when Semantic Scholar returns it.
The continuation token when Semantic Scholar returns it.

items.description: The paper object returned by Semantic Scholar.

papers.description: The papers returned by Semantic Scholar.

raw.description: The raw Semantic Scholar response payload.

outputSchema.description: A Semantic Scholar paper list response.

actions.name: get_authors
actions.description: Get details for multiple Semantic Scholar authors at once.

fields.description: A comma-separated list of Semantic Scholar fields to return, using dot notation for nested fields when needed.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving multiple Semantic Scholar authors.

anyOf.description: The author object returned by Semantic Scholar.

authors.description: The authors returned in the same order as the requested IDs.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving multiple Semantic Scholar authors.

actions.name: get_paper
actions.description: Get details for a Semantic Scholar paper by paper ID or external identifier.

paperId.description: The Semantic Scholar paper ID, CorpusId, DOI:<doi>, ARXIV:<id>, MAG:<id>, ACL:<id>, PMID:<id>, or PMCID:<id>.

fields.description: A comma-separated list of Semantic Scholar fields to return, using dot notation for nested fields when needed.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving a Semantic Scholar paper.

paper.description: The paper object returned by Semantic Scholar.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving a Semantic Scholar paper.

actions.name: get_paper_authors
actions.description: List authors for a Semantic Scholar paper.

paperId.description: The Semantic Scholar paper ID, CorpusId, DOI:<doi>, ARXIV:<id>, MAG:<id>, ACL:<id>, PMID:<id>, or PMCID:<id>.

fields.description: A comma-separated list of Semantic Scholar fields to return, using dot notation for nested fields when needed.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return.

anyOf.description: The total result count when Semantic Scholar returns it.

actions.name: get_paper_citations
actions.description: List papers that cite a Semantic Scholar paper.

fields.description: A comma-separated list of Semantic Scholar fields to return, using dot notation for nested fields when needed.

anyOf.description: The total edge count when Semantic Scholar returns it.
The returned result offset when Semantic Scholar returns it.
The next offset when Semantic Scholar returns it.

items.description: One paper edge returned by Semantic Scholar.

data.description: The citation or reference edges returned by Semantic Scholar.

raw.description: The raw Semantic Scholar response payload.

actions.name: recommend_for_paper

fields.description: A comma-separated list of Semantic Scholar fields to return, using dot notation for nested fields when needed.

limit.description: The maximum number of recommendations to return.

items.description: The paper object returned by Semantic Scholar.

papers.description: The papers returned by Semantic Scholar.

positivePaperIds.description: The paper IDs that represent positive examples.

items.description: The Semantic Scholar paper ID, CorpusId, DOI:<doi>, ARXIV:<id>, MAG:<id>, ACL:<id>, PMID:<id>, or PMCID:<id>.

negativePaperIds.description: The paper IDs that represent negative examples.

fields.description: A comma-separated list of Semantic Scholar fields to return, using dot notation for nested fields when needed.

limit.description: The maximum number of recommendations to return.

anyOf.description: The total result count when Semantic Scholar returns it.

The continuation token when Semantic Scholar returns it.

items.description: The paper object returned by Semantic Scholar.

papers.description: The papers returned by Semantic Scholar.
